[REST-034] Closed a stale P1: RQ-REST-013 (exit re-sim) was blocked on network since May 18. It didn't need network — cached 4-pair daily OHLC (2014-2026) is already on disk. Ran the full price-path re-sim. It INDEPENDENTLY REPLICATES your 2026-07-01 ExitConfig sweep: wider 1.5-2.0x trail ranks best, the per-trade -60.8R trailing 'drag' does NOT become a portfolio gain (my reconstruction recovers only ~1/2.9 of recorded sumR and flips 2022 from +36R to negative), and the signal-driven reversal exit carries +28R no mechanical exit reproduces. Conclusion: no new exit lever, v015 stays optimal — RQ-REST-013 marked DONE (converged), not reopened. Nothing live touched. Details: FIND-REST-034-a, data/agent/rq_rest_013_resim_results.json.

messages.subject: 🚨 LOOP CRITICAL: ict_scanner silent 2h
messages.message: ict_scanner has not run for 2h (expected < 0.5h; >2x threshold = broken, not late). The self-improvement machinery is degraded — a system that doesn't reflect doesn't compound. Check the loop's launchd plist is loaded (`launchctl list | grep alta`) and its logs/.heartbeat_<loop> mtime.
